title: Codereview: Duplicate lollipop logic in dodag.rs and routing.rs
description: Identical lollipop sequence comparison code duplicated. Extract to shared utility in lib.rs to eliminate dead code warnings and improve maintainability. Tagged for CCP integration as version/seq coordination may relate to TDMA rendezvous.
close_reason: extracted lollipop_is_newer to lib.rs:20; updated dodag.rs:25 and routing.rs:28 to delegate; cargo test+clippy pass 3x; no test changes
